name: cc-executor-subagents
description: Fast multi-agent executor for Claude Code. Splits quick repo tasks into independent slices, uses AGY 3.6.0+ as the required front-end and large-context agent (with native Gemini subagent fan-out via --parallel), keeps Codex for backend, tests, and review, and reports without OpenSpec ceremony.

plugins.name: cc-executor-subagents
plugins.description: Executor skill + /executor slash command for quick multi-agent implementation. Runs a light preflight, routes front-end and image work to AGY, keeps Codex on backend, tests, and review, then integrates and verifies without OpenSpec ceremony.
